backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP backend that manages image storage and user profiles with access control, supporting upload, retrieval, deletion, and listing of PNG images.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (footage metadata and user profiles with bio) into the new schema (images map and user profiles without bio).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features (PNG uploader UI and minimal visual theme) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and config file's purpose.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, defining colors for background, foreground, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Thumbnail Uploader' that mounts the React app via a root div and Vite module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with a single route at '/' rendering ThumbnailUploadPage inside a Layout that includes Header, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Minimal footer displaying copyright year and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with ThumbnailUploader branding and an Internet Identity login/logout button that handles authentication state and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for image CRUD operations and user profile management, using the backend actor for data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with a light OKLCH-based design token theme, and defines utility classes for upload zones and card shadows.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ThumbnailUploadPage.t: A page component for uploading, previewing, and deleting PNG thumbnail images, with drag-and-drop support, upload progress tracking, and validation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning them from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-query plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Thumbnail PNG Uploader project, including completed frontend features (drag-and-drop UI, live preview, PNG validation, minimal theme) and a pending backend task (AR-1) to build an actor for storing, retrieving, and deleting PNG thumbnails.
